summary: Platform for finding event organisers. Fixing portfolio images appearing in events photos section, and making events photos visible to customers on Find Organisers page via View button preview.
known_issues: Portfolio images incorrectly appearing in events photos section
Events photos not visible to customers on Find Organisers page

existing_features.title: Fix the OrganizerCard component and its associated lightbox/gallery (EventPhotoLightbox) in the Find Organisers page so that clicking the 'View' button on an organiser card shows that organiser's events photos (EventPhoto records), not their portfolio images.

In the Organiser Dashboard (OrganizerDashboard), ensure the events photos upload section (EventPhotoUpload) is a dedicated, clearly labelled section separate from the portfolio images upload section (PortfolioUpload). Organisers must be able to upload, view, and delete events photos independently from portfolio images after their profile is created.

In the OrganizerProfileView component, ensure the portfolio gallery section only displays portfolio images (portfolio_images) and does not render any event photos. Event photos should not appear anywhere in the read-only organiser profile view shown to customers.

new_feature_requests.summary: Separate portfolio images from events photos — portfolio only in dedicated Portfolio section, events photos tied to specific events
Show events photos preview to customers via View button on organiser cards in Find Organisers page
Events photos uploaded by organisers within event management section after profile creation

Ensure portfolio images and events photos are completely separate data sections in the backend. Portfolio images (portfolio_images field on OrganizerProfile) must never appear in the events photos section, and event photos (EventPhoto type stored per event) must never appear in the portfolio section.
